customFunctionsPath.description: Path(s) to your custom functions folder. This is used to generate metadata and to provide full extension feature support for your custom functions.

additionalPackages.description: Additional packages/extensions to fetch metadata from. By default, installed Forge packages are detected automatically. This property is only needed if metadata fetching fails or you want to include extra packages.

colors.description: The individual highlight colors used for syntax highlighting.

function.description: The highlight colors used for single function parts.

name.description: The highlight color used for function names.

dollar.description: The highlight color used for function dollar signs ($).

semicolon.description: The highlight color used for function semicolons (;).

operators.description: The highlight colors used for function operators.

negation.description: The highlight color used for the negation operator (!).

silent.description: The highlight color used for the silent operator (#).

count.description: The highlight color used for the count operator (@[x]).

countDelimiter.description: The highlight color used for the count operator delimiter (separator).

features.description: The default features included within the extension. You can choose individually which ones to enable or disable.

folding.description: Whether folding for multi-line function contents should be enabled.

hoverInfo.description: Whether hover info cards for functions and operators should be enabled.

suggestions.description: Whether suggestions for bracket placement should be enabled.

signatureHelp.description: Whether signature help for function arguments should be enabled.

diagnostics.description: Whether diagnostics for function validation should be enabled.

autocompletion.description: Whether autocompletion for functions and arguments should be enabled.
